title: Dijkstra's Shortest Path Algorithm
description: Find shortest path between nodes in weighted graph
mermaid: graph TD A1[Initialize graph and start node] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff B1[Distances: infinity for all nodes, 0 for start node] style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff C1[Unvisited set: all nodes] style C1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff D1[Current Node = Start Node] style D1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff E1[While Unvisited set is not empty] style E1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 E1 --> F1{Is Unvisited set empty?} style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1 -- Yes --> G1[Shortest paths are calculated] style G1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff F1 -- No --> H1[Get node with smallest distance from unvisited set as Current Node] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1{Is Current Node null?} style I1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 I1 -- Yes --> G1 style I1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 I1 -- No --> J1[Remove Current Node from Unvisited set] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1[For each neighbor of Current Node] style K1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 K1 --> L1{Is neighbor in Unvisited set?} style L1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 L1 -- No --> K1 style L1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 L1 -- Yes --> M1[Calculate tentative distance to neighbor: distance[Current Node] + edge weight] style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 --> N1{Is tentative distance < distance[neighbor]?} style N1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 N1 -- Yes --> O1[Update distance[neighbor] = tentative distance] style O1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff O1 --> P1[Update previous[neighbor] = Current Node] style P1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff P1 --> K1 N1 -- No --> K1 K1 --> H1
